## Lam Research and Quanta Services underperform peers despite gains on a positive tape

LRCX underperformance on an AI-driven up-tape is a mild flag for semiconductor equipment sentiment; without a fundamental driver it may reflect profit-taking or rotation rather than thesis deterioration, but worth monitoring into the next catalyst.

- Both LRCX and PWR posted gains on the day but lagged their respective peer groups.
- No fundamental driver or company-specific news was cited for either name.
- Relative underperformance is price-action only.
- Both names lagged on a broadly strong AI-driven tape, potentially signaling near-term positioning headwinds.
